item.title: About Me
item.description:
Me

Sen Yang

Fudan University

CTF

ID: syang

Education

  • 2019 - present, Fudan University (FDU)

    • Master of Science in Cyberspace Security

  • 2015 - 2019, Fudan University (FDU)

    • The School of Software Engineering
    • Bachelor of Engineering in Software Engineering

Publications

App in the middle: Demystify Application Virtualization in Android and its Security Threats.

Lei Zhang, Zhemin Yang, Yuyu He, Mingqi Li, Sen Yang, Min Yang, Yuan Zhang, Zhiyun Qian. In Proceedings of the 2019 ACM International Conference on Measurement and Modeling of Computer Systems , SIGMETRICS’19, Phoenix, Arizona, USA, June 24-28, 2019.

How You Get Shot in the Back: A Systematical Study about Cryptojacking in the Real World.

Geng Hong, Zhemin Yang, Sen Yang, Lei Zhang, Yuhong Nan, Zhibo Zhang, Min Yang, Yuan Zhang, Zhiyun Qian, Haixin Duan. In Proceedings of the 25th ACM Conference on Computer and Communications Security, CCS’18, Toronto, Canada, October 15-19, 2018.

Contact Me

Github: https://github.com/syang-ng

Email: syang15 AT fudan.edu.cn
